summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Hussnain Digital Academy e-learning platform. All core features tested including homepage, courses, authentication, student dashboard, admin panel, and enrollment management. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95%+ functional with excellent integration.

design_issues.issue: Diploma tracks preview and reviews preview sections may not display consistently on homepage

passed_tests: All 7 courses load correctly on courses page
Course search and filter functionality works
Course detail pages display with weekly outlines
Homepage loads with hero section, featured courses, benefits, FAQ
Navigation between all pages (Home, Courses, Reviews, About, Contact, FAQ, Login)
Google OAuth login page loads correctly
Student dashboard loads for authenticated users
Admin dashboard loads with stats and navigation
Responsive design works on mobile, tablet, desktop
All backend API endpoints return correct data
Payment status management works (MOCKED as expected)
